title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do America
tagline: Coming to a screen bigger than your TV.
overview: Slacker duo Beavis and Butt-Head wake to discover their TV has been stolen. Their search for a new one takes them on a clueless adventure across America, during which they manage to accidentally become America's most wanted.

cast.name: Mike Judge
cast.character: Beavis / Butt-Head / Tom Anderson (Old Guy With Camper) / Van Driessen (Hippie Teacher) / Principal McVicker (voice)

cast.name: Cloris Leachman
cast.character: Old Woman On Plane and Bus (voice)

cast.name: Pamela Blair
cast.character: Flight Attendant / White House Tour Guide (voice)

cast.name: Eric Bogosian
cast.character: Ranger at Old Faithful / Press Secretary / Lieutenant at Strategic Air Command (voice)

cast.name: Kristofor Brown
cast.character: Man on Plane / Man in Confession Booth #2 / Old Guy/Jim (voice)
